response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to MCP and cloud platforms, aligning well with core responsibilities; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal AI/ML domain expertise, raising questions about depth in GenAI-specific delivery.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Demonstrated leadership across full-stack and cloud-native projects (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong track record of technical mentorship, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems; experience appears more generalist
Missing explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques
Limited visibility into data pipeline design for unstructured data or AI evaluation/observability frameworks

key_factors.factor: Lack of Explicit GenAI/Vector DB Experience
